channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: Universes opens for speakers—deadline May 1. Ship & Tell, demos, and workshops spark new ideas, but only if you submit. ⏳🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/github-universe-2026-call-for-speakers-may-deadline #DevCon #GitHub #TechEvents

item.title: Notebooks crash Gemini into one workflow: syncs with NotebookLM, keeps sources in one persistent space. Paid now, free tier coming later. 🔗 https://Blockchain.News/news/google-integrates-notebooklm-gemini-notebooks-feature #AI #Google #Gemini
item.description: Notebooks crash Gemini into one workflow: syncs with NotebookLM, keeps sources in one persistent space. Paid now, free tier coming later. 🔗 https://Blockchain.News/news/google-integrates-notebooklm-gemini-notebooks-feature #AI #Google #Gemini

item.title: LangChain unlocks self-improving agents with Better-Harness. Evaluations become training signals, driving autonomous gains. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/langchain-better-harness-self-improving-ai-agents #AI #ML #LangChain
item.description: LangChain unlocks self-improving agents with Better-Harness. Evaluations become training signals, driving autonomous gains. 🚀 https://Blockchain.News/news/langchain-better-harness-self-improving-ai-agents #AI #ML #LangChain
